subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: In the Mashriqu'l-Adhkar services will be held every morning. There will be no organ in the Temple. In buildings nearby
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @music and singing, @harmony of science and religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
